title: Delhi Traffic Alert: Key Roads Near Ramlila Ground Likely to Be Affected on April 4 for Rally | Check Here
description: According to the advisory, traffic congestion is likely on JLN Marg, Asaf Ali Road, Chaman Lal Marg, Ajmeri Gate, and Minto Road during peak hours, and commuters have been advised to avoid these routes as diversions or restrictions may be imposed.
